title: pulmonaria obscura
intro: Pulmonaria obscura, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, Lungwort has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its high alkaloid content, including pulvines and pulmonarin. The plant's health benefits include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Pulmonaria obscura can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to exploit its medicinal properties.
